targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(amount_base, amount)), 0), 2) as value FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='investment'
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(amount_base, amount)), 0), 2) as value FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='investment'

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(h.quantity * COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0)), 0), 2) as value FROM holdings h LEFT JOIN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, price_base FROM asset_prices WHERE (asset_type, symbol, date) IN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, MAX(date) FROM asset_prices GROUP BY asset_type, symbol)) ap ON h.asset_type = ap.asset_type AND h.symbol = ap.symbol
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(h.quantity * COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0)), 0), 2) as value FROM holdings h LEFT JOIN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, price_base FROM asset_prices WHERE (asset_type, symbol, date) IN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, MAX(date) FROM asset_prices GROUP BY asset_type, symbol)) ap ON h.asset_type = ap.asset_type AND h.symbol = ap.symbol

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(h.quantity * COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0)), 0) - COALESCE(SUM(h.quantity * COALESCE(h.avg_buy_price, 0)), 0), 2) as value FROM holdings h LEFT JOIN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, price_base FROM asset_prices WHERE (asset_type, symbol, date) IN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, MAX(date) FROM asset_prices GROUP BY asset_type, symbol)) ap ON h.asset_type = ap.asset_type AND h.symbol = ap.symbol
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(h.quantity * COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0)), 0) - COALESCE(SUM(h.quantity * COALESCE(h.avg_buy_price, 0)), 0), 2) as value FROM holdings h LEFT JOIN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, price_base FROM asset_prices WHERE (asset_type, symbol, date) IN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, MAX(date) FROM asset_prices GROUP BY asset_type, symbol)) ap ON h.asset_type = ap.asset_type AND h.symbol = ap.symbol

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT category, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as total FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='investment' GROUP BY category ORDER BY total DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT category, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as total FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='investment' GROUP BY category ORDER BY total DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT h.asset_type, h.symbol, h.quantity, COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0) as price_pln, ROUND(h.quantity * COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0), 2) as value_pln, COALESCE(h.avg_buy_price, 0) as avg_buy_price, ROUND(h.quantity * COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0) - h.quantity * COALESCE(h.avg_buy_price, 0), 2) as gain_loss, h.source, h.updated_at FROM holdings h LEFT JOIN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, price_base FROM asset_prices WHERE (asset_type, symbol, date) IN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, MAX(date) FROM asset_prices GROUP BY asset_type, symbol)) ap ON h.asset_type = ap.asset_type AND h.symbol = ap.symbol ORDER BY value_pln DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT h.asset_type, h.symbol, h.quantity, COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0) as price_pln, ROUND(h.quantity * COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0), 2) as value_pln, COALESCE(h.avg_buy_price, 0) as avg_buy_price, ROUND(h.quantity * COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0) - h.quantity * COALESCE(h.avg_buy_price, 0), 2) as gain_loss, h.source, h.updated_at FROM holdings h LEFT JOIN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, price_base FROM asset_prices WHERE (asset_type, symbol, date) IN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, MAX(date) FROM asset_prices GROUP BY asset_type, symbol)) ap ON h.asset_type = ap.asset_type AND h.symbol = ap.symbol ORDER BY value_pln DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT currency, ROUND(SUM(ABS(amount)), 2) as total FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') GROUP BY currency ORDER BY total DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT currency, ROUND(SUM(ABS(amount)), 2) as total FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') GROUP BY currency ORDER BY total DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', month || '-01') AS INTEGER) as time, from_currency || '/' || to_currency as pair, rate FROM exchange_rates ORDER BY month
targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', month || '-01') AS INTEGER) as time, from_currency || '/' || to_currency as pair, rate FROM exchange_rates ORDER BY month

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', substr(date,1,7) || '-07') AS INTEGER) as time, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as invested FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='investment' AND date >= date('now', '-12 months') GROUP BY substr(date,1,7) ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', substr(date,1,7) || '-07') AS INTEGER) as time, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as invested FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='investment' AND date >= date('now', '-12 months') GROUP BY substr(date,1,7) ORDER BY time

targets.rawQueryText: WITH portfolio AS (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(h.quantity * COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0)), 0) as current_value FROM holdings h LEFT JOIN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, price_base FROM asset_prices WHERE (asset_type, symbol, date) IN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, MAX(date) FROM asset_prices GROUP BY asset_type, symbol)) ap ON h.asset_type = ap.asset_type AND h.symbol = ap.symbol), growth(year_n, value) AS (SELECT 0, current_value FROM portfolio UNION ALL SELECT year_n + 1, ROUND(value * (1 + ${annual_return}/100.0), 0) FROM growth WHERE year_n < 20) SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', (CAST(strftime('%Y','now') AS INTEGER) + year_n) || '-01-01') AS INTEGER) as time, value as projected_value FROM growth
targets.queryText: WITH portfolio AS (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(h.quantity * COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0)), 0) as current_value FROM holdings h LEFT JOIN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, price_base FROM asset_prices WHERE (asset_type, symbol, date) IN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, MAX(date) FROM asset_prices GROUP BY asset_type, symbol)) ap ON h.asset_type = ap.asset_type AND h.symbol = ap.symbol), growth(year_n, value) AS (SELECT 0, current_value FROM portfolio UNION ALL SELECT year_n + 1, ROUND(value * (1 + ${annual_return}/100.0), 0) FROM growth WHERE year_n < 20) SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', (CAST(strftime('%Y','now') AS INTEGER) + year_n) || '-01-01') AS INTEGER) as time, value as projected_value FROM growth

panels.title: Projected Portfolio Growth (${annual_return}% annual return, no contributions)

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT substr(date,1,7) as m FROM transactions ORDER BY m DESC
list.label: Cycle
list.name: cycle
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT substr(date,1,7) as m FROM transactions ORDER BY m DESC
